zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs於1005年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇時，他的父親Friedrich I. von Hohenstaufen41歲，母親Kunigunde von Öhningen25歲。他於大約1026年與Hadamut von Eppenstein結婚。他於1053年被列為pfalzgrave von schwaben。他去世於1075年1月23日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 瓦爾書特桑可特 布拉謝。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs于1005年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇时，他的父亲Friedrich I. von Hohenstaufen41岁，母亲Kunigunde von Öhningen25岁。他于大约1026年与Hadamut von Eppenstein结婚。他于1053年被列为pfalzgrave von schwaben。他去世于1075年1月23日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 瓦爾書特桑可特 布拉謝。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs was born in 1005, in Holy Roman Empire, his father, Friedrich I. von Hohenstaufen, was 41 and his mother, Kunigunde von Öhningen, was 25. He married Hadamut von Eppenstein about 1026. In 1053, at the age of 48, his occupation is listed as pfalzgrave von schwaben. He died on 23 January 1075, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Sankt Blasien, Waldshut, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs est né en 1005, à Saint-Empire romain, son père, Friedrich I. von Hohenstaufen, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde von Öhningen, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Hadamut von Eppenstein environ 1026. En 1053, à l’âge de 48 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est pfalzgrave von schwaben. Il est décédé le 23 janvier 1075, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Sankt Blasien, Landkreis Waldshut, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs 1005 in Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich I. von Hohenstaufen 41 und seine Mutter Kunigunde von Öhningen 25. Er hat um 1026 Hadamut von Eppenstein geheiratet. 1053, als er 48 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als pfalzgrave von schwaben aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. Januar 1075 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Sankt Blasien, Landkreis Waldshut, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs è nato il nel 1005 nel Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Friedrich I. von Hohenstaufen, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Kunigunde von Öhningen, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Hadamut von Eppenstein circa 1026. Nel 1053, all'età di 48 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come pfalzgrave von schwaben. Morì il 23 gennaio 1075, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Sankt Blasien, Landkreis Waldshut, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechsが1005年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチで生まれた時，父Friedrich I. von Hohenstaufenは41歳，母Kunigunde von Öhningenは25歳であった。約1026年にHadamut von Eppensteinと結婚した。1053年，48歳の時，職業はpfalzgrave von schwabenと記録されている。彼は1075年1月23日に故郷で70歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス ワルドシュトサンクト ブラシンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs(이)가 1005년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich I. von Hohenstaufen(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Kunigunde von Öhningen(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1026년 Hadamut von Eppenstein(와)과 결혼했다. 1053년, 48세의 나이로 그의 직업은 pfalzgrave von schwaben이었다. 그는 1075년 1월 23일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 월드슈트 산k트 블라시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs nasceu em 1005, em Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Friedrich I. von Hohenstaufen, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde von Öhningen, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Hadamut von Eppenstein aproximadamente 1026. Em 1053, com 48 anos, sua profissão aparece como pfalzgrave von schwaben. Ele faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1075, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Sankt Blasien, Landkreis Waldshut, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs родился в 1005 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Friedrich I. von Hohenstaufen было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde von Öhningen, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Hadamut von Eppenstein около 1026 г. В 1053 году, в возрасте 48 лет,  он работал по профессии pfalzgrave von schwaben. Он умер 23 января 1075 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности санкт бласиен, ландкрис валдшут, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs nació en 1005, en Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Friedrich I. von Hohenstaufen, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Kunigunde von Öhningen, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Hadamut von Eppenstein aproximadamente 1026. En 1053, a la edad de 48 años, su ocupación registrada era pfalzgrave von schwaben. Murió el 23 de enero de 1075, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Sankt Blasien, Landkreis Waldshut, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.

th.Dießen am Ammersee, Landsberg am Lech, B: ดีssเอน อาม อามร์รสเอ, ลันดกไรส ลันดสเบรก อาม เลเอช, แบเยรน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Sankt Blasien, Waldshut, Baden-Württembe: แซนคเต บลาเซียน, ลันดกไรส ว่าลดซูต, แบเดน-วuร์ตเอมเบรก, ประเทศเยอรมัน
